productsliderwidget.name: Product Slider Widget
productsliderwidget.description: Display a slider of products from a specific collection.

collection.label: Collection
collection.description: Select the collection to display products from.

itemsToShow.label: Items to Show
itemsToShow.description: Number of products to show in the slider.

autoplay.label: Autoplay
autoplay.description: Enable or disable autoplay for the slider.
